name: Layered Banana Pudding
recipeInstructions:
My mother gave me this recipe, which an old friend shared with her. There's no comparison between this recipe and the instant pudding mixes from the grocery store!
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the flour and brown sugar; stir in milk.
2. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
3. Continue cooking and stirring for 1 minute more.
4. Remove from the heat.
5. Gradually stir about 1 cup hot mixture into egg yolks.
6. Return all to the saucepan.
7. Bring to a gentle boil; cook and stir for 2 minutes.
8. Remove from the heat; stir in butter and vanilla.
9. Cool to room temperature, stirring occasionally.
10. Fold in the whipped cream.
11. Layer one-third of the pudding in a 2 quart glass bowl.
12. Top with half of the bananas.
13. Repeat layers.
14. Top with remaining pudding.
15. Sprinkle with nuts if desired.
16. Cover and chill at least 1 hour before serving.
